text: Doctor ne phir stress bol kar nikaal diya, par unhe kya pata ki bedridden Bapu ki seva aur bacchon ki akeli zimmedari mere thakne ka intezar nahi karti. Divorcee hone ki wajah se pehle hi log baatein banate hain, isliye main apna dard daba kar bas machine ki tarah lagi rehti hoon taaki koi 'natak' na kahe. Thakan se poora badan toot raha hai, par rukkna mere liye option hi nahi kyunki main hi ghar ki akeli breadwinner hoon.

Dementia se jujh rahe pitaji ki caregiving aur hospital ka kharcha itna hai ki Doctor ka 'stress' bolna mujhe mazak lagta hai. Single mother hone ke naate mujhe double endurance dikhani padti hai taaki bacchon ki parvarish aur schooling mein koi kami na aaye. Main thak kar choor hoon par mera 'farz' mujhe sone nahi deta, kyunki agar main ruki toh humari bachi-kuchi 'izzat' bhi mitti mein mil jayegi.

Jab Doctor ne kaha ki ye sab dimaag ka khel hai, toh mujhe laga unhe meri economic precarity ka ehsas hi nahi jahan mujhe bimar baap aur bacchon ke liye bina ruke kaam karna hai. Samaj mein community exclusion ka darr hamesha rehta hai, isliye main apni health neglect karke bas endurance dikha rahi hoon. Mere paas rone ka waqt nahi hai kyunki structural endurance hi meri zindagi ki sacchai ban gayi hai.

Bimar baap ki seva mein poori raat nikal jati hai aur subah bacchon ko school bhej kar kaam pe jana meri duty hai, bhale hi Doctor meri takleef dismiss kar dein. Log kahenge ki divorced aurat hai isliye nakhre kar rahi hai, isliye main chupchap sara bojh utha rahi hoon. Main afford nahi kar sakti ki ek din bhi break loon kyunki bacchon ka bhavishya sirf meri mehnat par tika hai.

Doctor ne phir stress bol kar nikaal diya, par bedridden mareez ki seva aur bacchon ki wellbeing ke beech mera dum ghut raha hai. Main ek single parent hoon aur hamare samaj mein rukkne ka matlab hai 'failure' ka thappa lagwana, isliye main bas bina ruke chalti ja rahi hoon. Thakan itni hai ki aankhon ke samne andhera aata hai, par mera dharma hi mera asli sahara hai jo mujhe girne nahi deta.
